description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the docker:stable Docker image with a docker:dind service and sets DOCKER_DRIVER to overlay2 and DOCKER_HOST to tcp://docker:2375. Define a single build stage and a build job that runs in this stage. In a before_script it logs in to $CI_REGISTRY using $CI_REGISTRY_USER and $CI_REGISTRY_PASSWORD. The build job executes: docker build --tag $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$CI_COMMIT_SHA --tag $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE/$CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME:latest . then docker push $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$CI_COMMIT_SHA and docker push $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE/$CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME:latest. The pipeline has no caches, artifacts, or conditional rules.
